case_title: SAN FRANCISCANS FOR SPORTS AND RECREATION VS. ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO. 53, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

CROSS COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100172315) FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO. 53, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ALEXANDRIA REAL ESTATE EQUITIES, L.P. A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCANS FOR SPORTS AND RECREATION A CALIFORNIA MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION, FKA SOS SFTC 2.0 DOES 1 THROUGH 10,

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCANS FOR SPORTS AND RECREATION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 TO BE HEARD ON 10/11/22 AT THE SAME TIME. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL CASES INVOLVING THE TRANSFER OF REAL PROPERTY PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-11-2022 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCANS FOR SPORTS AND RECREATION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. IT CANNOT BE DETERMINED AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT PARAGRAPH 4.8 OF THE AGREEMENT REQUIRES CONSENT OF THE PLAINTIFF FOR DEFENDANT'S TRANSFER OF TITLE TO THE PROPERTY. CONSENT IS CLEARLY REQUIRED AS TO "THIS AGREEMENT, ANY RIGHTS OR DUTIES EXPRESSED HEREIN," BUT NOT AS TO TITLE, MAKING THIS PROVISION SUSCEPTIBLE TO MULTIPLE INTERPRETATIONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-05-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO. 53, LLC, ALEXANDRIA REAL ESTATE EQUITIES, L.P. NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED. BASED ON THE GRAVAMEN OF THE PROPOSED NEW ALLEGATIONS, CROSS-COMPLAINT SEEKS TO SUPPLEMENT THE COMPLAINT (ALLEGING FACTS OCCURRING AFTER THE FILING OF THE ORIGINAL CROSS-COMPLAINT). HOWEVER, THE REQUEST TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL COMPLAINT IS NOT MADE IN THE NOTICE OF THE MOTION AND IS NOT SUPPORTED BY LEGAL AUTHORITY. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MAY FILE A MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL COMPLAINT IF NECESSARY AND PROPER GIVEN THE PROCEDURAL POSTURE OF THIS CASE. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2023 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO. 53, LLC, ALEXANDRIA REAL ESTATE EQUITIES, L.P. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Cross-Complaint is DENIED. Based on the gravamen of the proposed new allegations, Cross-Complaint seeks to supplement the complaint (alleging facts occurring after the filing of the original cross-complaint). However, the request to file supplemental complaint is not made in the Notice of the motion and is not supported by legal authority. Cross-Complainant may file a motion for leave to file a supplemental complaint if necessary and proper given the procedural posture of this case. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Continued To Mar-01-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCANS FOR SPORTS AND RECREATION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is DENIED. It cannot be determined as a matter of law that paragraph 4.8 of the agreement requires consent of the plaintiff for defendant's transfer of title to the property. Consent is clearly required as to "this Agreement, any rights or duties expressed herein," but not as to title, making this provision susceptible to multiple interpretations.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Continued To Oct-11-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCANS FOR SPORTS AND RECREATION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Transferred to department 501 to be heard on 10/11/22 at the same time. That department handles all cases involving the transfer of real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
